ATProtoPDS Documentation

ATProtoPDS Documentation

This directory contains comprehensive documentation for the ATProtoPDS project, organized by topic and function.

Directory Index

Folder Description README
architecture/ System architecture diagrams, data models, and XRPC protocol reference README
examples/ Example configuration files (systemd service, etc.) —
guides/ Developer guides, setup instructions, and workflows —
oauth2/ OAuth 2.0 implementation with DPoP, PKCE, and token management README
plan/ Project roadmap and planning documents —
plans/ Detailed implementation plans and production readiness —
security/ Security analysis, testing plans, and vulnerability reports —
skills/ ATProto compliance review skills and audit tools README
tests/ Test documentation index covering 135 test classes README

Top-Level Documents

File Description
TESTING.md Comprehensive testing guide and methodology
atproto-plc-architecture.md ATProto PLC directory architecture
troubleshooting-2026-02-25.md PDS Configuration and Identity restoration logs
troubleshooting-relay-sync-2026-02-25.md Relay integration and sync troubleshooting logs
troubleshooting-bsky-ghost-posts-2026-02-26.md Ghost post visibility + GNUstep createRecord crash investigation and fixes
test-suite-stabilization-report-2026-03-01.md 100% Pass Rate stabilization effort, resolving 1267 test failures
troubleshooting-identity-cors-2026-03-01.md Identity resolution, spec compliance, and dynamic CORS fixes
security-and-architectural-remediation-report-2026-03-02.md 100% Pass Rate remediation report: security hardening, MST rebalancing, and protocol fixes
